prompt:
Create a premium dark-fantasy card illustration for an original game called Blood Rogue.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: combat card illustration
Primary request: a single occult hunter's eye suspended in darkness, with faint concentric rings and subtle runic light suggesting revealed weakness and sharpened perception.
Subject: one centered burning eye or sigil, no full character body
Style/medium: painterly gothic dark fantasy, mature deckbuilder art
Composition/framing: vertical 3:4 illustration, very clear centered subject, dark uncluttered edges, designed to remain legible inside a small card art window
Lighting/mood: focused, prophetic, dangerous, ritual
Color palette: old gold, faded ivory, ember orange, blackened crimson, soot black
Materials/textures: smoke, ash, scorched parchment glow, faint etched rune light
Constraints: no text, no logo, no frame, no watermark, no extra characters, no modern objects
Avoid: no cartoon style, no anime, no bright neon magic, no busy background

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: combat card illustration
Primary request: a tight martial vignette of a spear or javelin thrust driving forward through darkness, emphasizing the weapon tip, forward motion, and compact brutality of a precise stab.
Subject: one centered spear thrust or javelin strike, cropped tight, no full battlefield
Style/medium: painterly gothic dark fantasy, mature deckbuilder art
Composition/framing: vertical 3:4 illustration, strong central silhouette, readable at small size, dark edges for card cropping
Lighting/mood: direct, disciplined, fast, lethal
Color palette: steel gray, old bronze, dark leather brown, restrained blood red, soot black
Materials/textures: sharpened steel, worn leather, sparks, faint blood mist, smoky shadow
Constraints: no text, no logo, no frame, no watermark, no extra characters, no modern weapons
Avoid: no gore pile, no cartoon style, no anime, no busy scene
